title: Billing
connectPrompt: Connect an OpenYak account to top up and access premium models.
freeQuotaDesc: Free models available to all accounts. Resets every Friday at 12:00 UTC.
buyCreditsDesc: Same price as OpenRouter. Zero markup. Balance never expires.
noTransactions: No transactions yet. Top up to get started.
quotaExceededDesc: You've used your weekly free token quota. It resets every Friday at 12:00 UTC. Top up for unlimited access to premium models like Claude, GPT-4, and more.
creditsRequiredDesc: This model requires a paid balance. Top up to unlock premium models.
